Package index

ASTR objects

Functions for creating and handling ASTR objects.

as_ASTR() read_ASTR() validate() format(<ASTR>) print(<ASTR>) get_contextual_columns() get_analytical_columns() get_isotope_columns() get_element_columns() get_ratio_columns() get_concentration_columns() get_unit_columns() remove_units() unify_concentration_unit()
ASTR Schema implementation

Data subsetting

Pre-compiled lists for easier subsetting of data

isotopes_data
Isotopes
elements_data
Chemical elements
oxides_data
Oxides
special_oxide_states
Special oxide states

Unit conversions

Functions and data tables for conversions between untis not covered in {units}

wt_to_at() at_to_wt()
Conversion between wt% and at%
element_to_oxide() oxide_to_element()
Oxide conversion functions
conversion_oxides
Conversion factors from oxides to elements

Calculations, Classifications, Statistics

Functions for data transformation

copper_alloy_bb()
Copper alloy classification according to Bayley & Butcher (2004)
copper_alloy_pollard()
Copper alloy classification according to Pollard et al. (2015).
copper_group_bray()
Copper classification according to Bray et al. (2015)
pb_iso_age_model() stacey_kramers_1975() cumming_richards_1975() albarede_juteau_1984()
Calculate lead isotope age models
pointcloud_distribution()
Comparing isotope samples to reference data in 3D space

Visualisation

Functions for plotting data

geom_kde2d()
Draw 2D kernel density estimate polygons by quantiles
geom_sk_lines() geom_sk_labels()
Stacey-Kramers Lead Evolution Geom

Data

Datasets included in the package

ArgentinaDatabase
Lead isotope data fro Argentina

On this page

Developed by Thomas Rose, Mathias Ayine Abagna, Andrea Acevedo Mejia, Gilberto Artioli, María Florencia Becerra, Adam Kevin Benfer, Lisa Bellemère, Thomas Edward Birch, Karan Desai, Paolo d’Imporzano, Tzilla Eshel, Valerio Gentile, Sabine Klein, Catherine Klesner, Kathryn Murphy, Ben Marwick, Stephen Merkel, Marco Daniele Pelizzari, Alexandra Rodler, Benjamin Sabatini, Clemens Schmid, Berber van der Meulen-van der Veen, Chen Wang, Katrin Julia Westner, Deutsche Forschungsgemeinschaft, Lorentz Center.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
